name: AXN Resolution Map — Zenodo DOI to Alexanarch AXN
description: Machine-readable resolution map from purged Zenodo DOIs (terminated 2026-06-19) to sovereign Alexanarch AXN identifiers. The AXN's six-emoji glyph is the content-checksum: the first six bytes of the deposit hash made legible. Canonical registry: https://alexanarch.org/data/doi-resolution-index.json
